target_resource.description: The resource on which the posture should be deployed. This can be in one of the following formats: projects/{project_number}, folders/{folder_number}, organizations/{organization_id}

posture_id.description: Relative name of the posture which needs to be deployed. It should be in the format: organizations/{organization_id}/locations/{location}/postures/{posture_id}

posture_revision_id.description: Revision_id the posture which needs to be deployed.

parent.description: The parent of the resource, an organization. Format should be `organizations/{organization_id}`.

location.description: The location of the resource, eg. global`.
